tasks.label: Build LaTeX
tasks.command: if command -v latexmk >/dev/null 2>&1; then latexmk -pdf main.tex; else pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode main.tex; fi

tasks.label: Clean LaTeX
tasks.command: if command -v latexmk >/dev/null 2>&1; then latexmk -c main.tex; else rm -f *.aux *.log *.out *.toc *.fls *.fdb_latexmk *.synctex.gz; fi
